assumptions: The intragroup dividends have become an unconditional receivable and corresponding payable.
The issue is assessed in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components thereof that expose the entity to changes affecting profit or loss.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for variability in cash flows of recognised items or highly probable forecast transactions that could affect profit or loss, including certain intragroup foreign currency exposures in consolidation.
